task: Show me community posts about pregnancy fever from the past 30 days.
graderReasoning: The agent reached BabyCenter Community search results with the Community tab selected and the 'Past 30 Days' filter visible. It extracted multiple relevant community items about fever/illness while pregnant, including titles, groups, dates, snippets, and links, all backed by page text from the BabyCenter search results pages. Although the user said 'posts' and the final list included some comments as well, it still showed community posts about pregnancy fever from the past 30 days and clearly noted exclusion of unrelated 'baby fever' items. This satisfies the task intent.
final_result_response:
I searched BabyCenter Community with the “Past 30 Days” filter, covering Apr 13 to May 13, 2026.

Most relevant fever/illness-while-pregnant results:

| Type | Title | Group | Date | Snippet |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Comment | [22 weeks diarrhea & listeria worry!](https://community.babycenter.com/post/a78698641/22-weeks-diarrhea-listeria-worry?cid=2622072108) | August 2026 Birth Club | 04-21-26 | Mentions flu-like symptoms: “fever, headache, chills, body ache.” |
| Post | [Severe Rib Pain from Coughing](https://community.babycenter.com/post/a78697784/severe-rib-pain-from-coughing) | May 2026 Birth Club | 04-17-26 | “I’m currently 34+ weeks pregnant…” |
| Post | [“Weaning flu” while pregnant?](https://community.babycenter.com/post/a78699404/weaning-flu-while-pregnant) | Breastfeeding | 04-28-26 | “11w pregnant with my second…” |
| Post | [Urinalysis is cleared but Kidney Infection Symptoms?](https://community.babycenter.com/post/a78697621/urinalysis-is-cleared-but-kidney-infection-symptoms) | November 2026 Birth Club | 04-16-26 | Pregnancy plus possible infection symptoms. |
| Comment | [Colds while pregnant (16 weeks)](https://community.babycenter.com/post/a78703820/colds-while-pregnant16-weeks?cid=2622116371) | October 2026 Birth Club | Today, about 5 hours ago | “Sickness while pregnant is not fun…” |
| Comment | [Strep b](https://community.babycenter.com/post/a78700103/strep-b?cid=2622084517) | November 2026 Birth Club | 04-28-26 | Mentions fever as a risk factor. |
| Comment | [Line Progression](https://community.babycenter.com/post/a78696809/line-progression?cid=2622057947) | Pregnancy Questions, Worries and Complaints | 04-14-26 | “Intense pain, fever or bleeding…” |
| Comment | [Still bleeding..](https://community.babycenter.com/post/a78699135/still-bleeding?cid=2622075888) | November 2026 Birth Club | 04-23-26 | Mentions severe cramping or fever. |

I also saw some “baby fever” results, like wanting another child, but I left those out of the main list since they’re not about having a fever during pregnancy.
action_history: Opening BabyCenter: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.babycenter.com/');
Looking for search controls: await page.locator('e1').click();
Searching BabyCenter for pregnancy fever: try { await page.locator('e141').click({timeout:3000}); } catch (err) {}
Opening BabyCenter search results: const p2 = await openTab('https://community.babycenter.com/search?q=pregnancy%20fever&currentTab=community&recency=30');
Opening page 2 of search results: await page.locator('e36').click();
Going to result page 2: await page.locator('e35').fill('2');
Going to result page 2: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Searching fever pregnant on BabyCenter: const p3 = await openTab('https://community.babycenter.com/search?q=fever%20pregnant&currentTab=community&recency=30');
Submitting a new BabyCenter search: await page.locator('e20').fill('fever pregnant');
Submitting a new BabyCenter search: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Closing dialog and going to page 2: await page.locator('e101').click();
Searching exact fever during pregnancy: const p4 = await openTab('https://community.babycenter.com/search?q=fever%20during%20pregnancy&currentTab=community&recency=30');

screenshots.title: Closing dialog and going to page 2
